title: Rice will get you far

seo.title: Rice will get you far - Marinda Kook

html:
Rice remains a staple for every meal. With so many different kinds on the market, rice really holds its own. Today I'm just going to cook plain white rice. I'll cook it on the stove top and also in the microwave.

ON THE STOVE

  • 1 cup of rice is more than enough for 2 people.
  • bring 2 cups of water and 5 ml salt to the boil in a pot on the stove
  • pour your 1 cup of rice into the boiling salted water and place the lid on at a slight angle.
  • after about 20 minutes your rice will be done, but still firm.
  • put the lid on properly and leave it to stand for 10 minutes, or if you have a rice strainer, you can steam it over water for a few minutes.
  1. WHITE RICE: 18 – 25 MINUTES
  2. BROWN RICE: 30 – 40 MINUTES
  3. WILD RICE: 45 – 60 MINUTES

IN THE MICROWAVE

  • place 2 cups of water, 1 cup of rice and 5 ml salt in an ovenproof dish
  • put it in the microwave without a lid and microwave for 13 minutes.
  • add another 1 cup of water and microwave for another 13 minutes
  • put the lid on and microwave for another 10 minutes.
  • stir with a fork so the rice comes out nice and loose
